title: 120ml Tallow Balms from $19.95
body:
Winter is almost here and dry itchy skin is on the rise. Stock up in time with a great price! Pulling out of retail has left us with a few extra jars. This is a once-off deal we probably can't afford to repeat. Grab a jar and help us clear the backlog! 

Moving to retail almost sunk our business, and if we don’t do something fast. Primalcare, the soothing tallow used by 100,000+ kiwis is about to go away for good. 

It's not their fault, our company just wasn't set up to compete in that space. 

So, we’re doing the unheard of for a NZ made skincare company. We’re pulling out of all 120 big retailers and going back to online where we started. 

It’s a scary thing to do, and we’re sorry to take away this convenience, but if we don’t, we can’t continue to make the products thousands of kiwi families use every day. 

Our retail partners do an amazing job serving kiwis and for the right type of business they can be an amazing opportunity. But for ours it just isn't a model we can sustain.

Thank you for your support and understanding. 
~ Curtis and the PrimalPantry team

title: See Why People Are Switching
body:
“My husband had scalp problems for years. We tried different products… some made it worse.
After 3 weeks using this soap, his scalp is totally clear.”

This message landed in our inbox after someone switched to our tallow shampoo bars.

Try it for $17.95.

Shop NZ’s most popular range of affordable soothing tallow skincare, used by over 100,000+ kiwis. Official gold supporters of the Eczema association and featured on SevenSharp, Stuff, The Press and the Radio. Try it today at PrimalPantry.co.nz

title: Barrier-building Tallow Day Cream
body:
Waking up to skin that feels tight, looks dull or flushes easily the moment you step outside? Don't let sensitive skin hold back your day.

Meet Reviana Protecting Day Cream (by Primalpantry) — your skin faces the most stress during the day: weather, pollution, free radicals. This cream is built to protect it.

What makes it special?

✨ Ultra-purified Tallow + Squalane for bio-identical hydration your skin recognises
✨ Niacinamide to strengthen your skin barrier and even out tone
✨ Tetrahexyldecyl Ascorbate — oil-soluble Vitamin C that brightens without stinging
✨ Zinc Oxide for a calming mineral finish
✨ Kakadu Plum — 100x more Vitamin C than oranges
✨ Lightweight and fast-absorbing, sits perfectly under makeup.

Naturally derived ingredients, made in New Zealand.

Made by Primalpantry, the team behind Primalcare Tallow. Trusted by 100,000+ kiwis.

Grab a jar today from Primalpantry.co.nz

title: We've improved our recipe
body:
20% off Tallow Day Cream! No Smell & Powered up recipe. 
Dull skin? Uneven tone? That washed-out look no matter how much sleep you got?

You've tried the moisturisers. The serums. The brightening creams. But most are water-based formulas your skin can't actually absorb — and they still don't work.

The problem isn't effort. It's ingredients.

Your skin has a lipid barrier. Most moisturisers can't get through it — they just sit on top. To actually penetrate, you need something your skin already recognises.

That's why we built Reviana Day Cream. A tallow-based moisturiser with Vitamin C, Niacinamide, Kakadu Plum and Zinc Oxide — formulated by one of New Zealand's top cosmetic formulators who's worked with billion-dollar beauty brands.

Lightweight. Fast absorbing. Barrier building.

Cosmeceutical-grade. No extras you don't need.

From PrimalPantry — creators of PrimalCare, trusted by 95,000+ Kiwis.

Try the new Reviana range today at PrimalPantry.co.nz

title: Natures answer to dry itchy skin
body:
If your skin still feels dry, tight, or reactive no matter what you put on it — the barrier might be the missing piece.

Tallow balm is rich in skin-compatible fats that help support the barrier from the outside in. Less dry redness, more comfort, over time.

Natures best kept secret for dry itchy skin (that 100,000 kiwis are already in on).

- As seen on Seven Sharp, The Press, and Stuff. 
- Gold Supporters of the Eczema Association of NZ.

title: Refreshing new tallow eye cream
body:
Dark circles. Puffiness. That tired look that won't quit.

You've tried the creams. The serums. The eye patches. But most are loaded with synthetics your skin doesn't recognise — and they still don't work.

The problem isn't effort. It's ingredients.

Your under-eye skin is the thinnest on your body. It needs something it can actually absorb — not fight off.

That's why we built Reviana. A tallow-based eye cream with caffeine and vitamin C, formulated by one of New Zealand's top cosmetic formulators who's worked with billion-dollar beauty brands.

Cosmeceutical-grade. No extras you don't need.

body:

Meet Reviana Repairing Night Cream (by Primalpantry) — your skin does its deepest repair while you sleep, this cream is built to support it. 
What makes it special?
+ Ceramides to replenish & rebuild your skin barrier overnight
+ Bakuchiol — the natural retinol alternative for cell renewal without irritation
+ Vitamin C for radiance & collagen boost
+ Kakadu Plum — 100x more Vitamin C than oranges
+ Ultra-purified Tallow for absorption and skin-identical hydration

Rich but never greasy, absorbs fully without irritation.

title: Soothing tallow used by 100,000+ kiwis
body:
We couldn't compete with the big guys, but we realised we were playing in the wrong field. Moving to retail almost sunk our business. If we didn't do something fast, Primalcare, NZ's favourite soothing tallow used daily by tens of thousands was about to go away for good. 

It's not their fault, our company just wasn't set up to compete in that space. 

So, we’re doing the unheard of for an upcoming NZ made skincare company. We’re pulling out of all 120 big retailers and going back to our roots selling online. 

It’s a scary thing to do, and we’re sorry to take away this convenience, but if we don’t, we can’t continue to make the products thousands of kiwi families use every day. 

Our retail partners do an amazing job serving kiwis and for the right type of business they can be an amazing opportunity. But for ours it just isn't a model we can sustain.

Thank you for your support and understanding. 
~ Curtis and the PrimalPantry team

title: Like Korean skincare, NZ made
body:
I couldn't believe my eyes when I saw it.
I guess that's what we get for taking on the big luxury Korean skincare brands — offering the same actives and high-quality ingredients at a fraction of the cost, with our own Kiwi spin.
Made with a gentle, ultra-pure tallow base, it's silky smooth, refreshing, and smells amazing. No hint of beef, no lumps — just something you'll actually look forward to putting on every night.
Designed for sensitive skin, it's just as gentle as Primalcare, but now powered up with the best actives used in modern beauty products.
Developed with the same cosmetic formulators trusted by billion-dollar skincare brands, and made in small batches right here in Christchurch.

title: Try Cacao & Orange Tallow Balm
body:
New! Limited Edition. A kiwi classic… reimagined for your skin with tallow 🍫 🍊 

Meet our NEW Midnight mousse Tallow face and body balms. 

Our Cacao & Orange Tallow with Manuka Honey — the first of its kind.

Everyone’s raving about the health benefits of cacao right now — and for good reason. 

It’s packed with antioxidants, magnesium, and essential fatty acids. Now imagine all of that goodness working directly on your skin.

Here’s what makes this one special:
🟤 Cacao — antioxidant-rich to help protect and nourish
🍊 Blood Orange — vitamin C for a brighter, more even complexion
🍯 Manuka Honey — naturally antibacterial, deeply soothing
🥩 Grass-Fed Tallow — mirrors your skin’s own fatty acid profile for deep, lasting hydration

We made this in limited quantities, and once it’s gone — it’s gone.
